daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving main character energy today. The cosmos is nudging you toward authenticity—lean into what makes you genuinely *you*, even if it's a little unconventional. Trust that instinct.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, there's a magnetic quality around you rn. If you've been holding back a conversation, the universe is basically saying go for it. Vulnerability hits different today.
daily.career: Your creative problem-solving is off the charts right now. That random idea bouncing around your head? It's worth exploring. Your unique perspective is literally your superpower in professional spaces.
daily.health: Your energy feels fresh, but don't ignore what your body's telling you. Gentle movement and hydration will keep you grounded. Listen to yourself—you know what you need better than anyone.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about authenticity, Aquarius. The cosmos is nudging you to lean into what makes you uniquely you instead of dimming your light for anyone. Trust the weird.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, the vibe is about deeper conversations and real connections. Don't settle for surface-level energy—ask the questions that actually matter to you.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is the week to pitch that unconventional project or voice your perspective in meetings. Your innovative take is exactly what's needed.
weekly.health: Your nervous system might feel a bit activated—honor that by building in some grounding practices. Whether it's time outside or just sitting with your thoughts, make space for stillness.
